$comment: Desktop scenario record. codeyam-registry capture of this app is currently blocked: the editor binary in this environment is a stale dev build whose `isolate` still scaffolds Next-style routes and cannot scaffold the Vite isolation harness, and the editor still serves the Next.js app on :3000 rather than the desktop Vite app on :1420. Until a current binary serves the desktop app, these scenarios are captured directly (Vite build + Playwright, 1440x900) and recorded here. Regenerate: `cd desktop && npm run build && npx vite preview --port 4191`, then screenshot each `<route>?s=<Scenario>`.

scenarios.note: Production day-one: no briefing — onboarding empty state.
Partial data: steady readiness, two vitals, no coach transmission, no workout.
Full briefing: readiness 72, overnight vitals, coach transmission, yesterday's workout.
Day-grouped feed: workouts, briefing, check-ins, body weight across two days.
Five metric sparkline cards across weekly/monthly/yearly.
Score dial 64, contributing signals with state labels, suggested actions.
Four goals as progress rings incl. a completed one.
Day-one: open morning form, no history.
Form + a trailing history of morning/evening check-ins.
